Steps to Plan Your Fireplace Makeover with a Gas Insert

paragraphs: Looking for fresh ideas to update your wood-burning fireplace? Explore this page for inspiration on transforming your outdated fireplace into a stunning centerpiece that brings warmth, coziness and convenience to your home.
A gas insert is specially designed to fit inside your existing wood-burning firebox. Installation by our team of pros typically takes less than a day.

Our hearth professionals take care of everything, including timely installation and all the coordination detail. An insert quickly transforms a drafty, outdated fireplace into an efficient gas solution you can use immediately.

Gas inserts deliver consistent and adjustable heat, ensuring a cozy atmosphere without the unpredictability of a wood fire. Our gas inserts are designed to contain and radiate heat back into the room, rather than losing most of the heat up a chimney flue.

Gas fireplace inserts redefine convenience, taking away the labor of chopping wood and dealing with soot, ash and smoke. The ease of operation, often facilitated by remote control, allows you to enjoy a real fire at the touch of a button.

Transform your home with our top-of-the-line Escape gas fireplace insert. The biggest, clearest view of the fire, hand-painted logs and efficient heating take your fireplace from unused to unbelievable. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

Bring home the look of a wood fire – without the hassle. The SupremeX gas insert features flames that wrap around hand-painted logs, creating a natural, cozy glow enhanced by an LED ember bed. Designed to maximize your fireplace opening, this insert offers a large and immersive fireside experience. And with design options to fit your aesthetic, it’ll feel like it was always part of your home. Available in 30-inch width.

Match your modern design style with the Cosmo gas insert. It fits directly inside your outdated, wood-burning firebox, turning an unusable fireplace into an efficient, easy-to-use gas fire. No more hassle, only pure fireplace enjoyment. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

With big flames and classic style, the Supreme gas fireplace insert gives your old, cold fireplace a beautiful makeover. Choose from the widest variety of logs and interior styles to get the look you love. Gathering around a roaring fire has never been easier thanks to this low-maintenance fireplace insert. Available in 25, 30 and 35-inch widths.

Restore the beauty and functionality of your fireplace with the Provident. This gas fireplace insert helps heat your home efficiently and provides a natural gathering space, all with the touch of a button. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.
Embark on a fireplace makeover journey with our guide to gas inserts. Discover the convenience, safety, and added value, transforming your space into a stylish haven.
Make your fireplace dreams a reality. Connect with a hearth expert to understand your options and get your project going.
There’s more in store! Stop by your local authorized Heat & Glo dealer to learn more and shop.
Browse our fireplace renovation articles to gain inspiration and ideas for your fireplace makeover project.
Summer is the perfect time for a fireplace makeover. Beat the rush, enjoy cozy evenings, and get expert advice for faster installation. Upgrade now!
